home.hero_subtitle: We connect households and small businesses to specialized and verified professionals.

lander.worker_body_1: It's simple and free! Hundreds of families are looking for qualified professionals. Create your profile, set your skills and start receiving proposals.
lander.worker_body_2: From domestic workers to nannies and gardeners, Mão Segura helps you get the right opportunity for you.
lander.employer_body_1: It's simple and free! Thousands of qualified professionals are waiting for opportunities. Describe your needs, set your budget and start receiving proposals in minutes.
lander.employer_body_2: From deep cleaning to specialized care for children or the elderly, Mão Segura helps you find the right person for your home.
lander.choose_body_1: No job is too small. We have thousands of professionals for services of any size, in more than 10 domestic specialties.
lander.choose_body_2: View detailed profiles, verify real references and analyze completed work history before making a decision.
lander.support_card_text: We are here to help with any questions or mediation needed.
lander.support_body_1: Your time is precious. Let our team of mediators and experts help you save time in talent selection.
lander.support_body_2: From document verification to support in case of conflicts, Mão Segura is your trusted partner in the informal market.
lander.about_heading: The largest trust network in Mozambique
lander.about_body_1: Mão Segura was born in 2024 with the mission of formalizing and bringing security to the domestic services market in Mozambique.
lander.about_body_2: We believe that every home deserves trusted professionals and that every worker deserves to be valued and respected.
lander.footer_desc: The largest trust network for domestic services in Mozambique.
